title: Kobarian swamp dog

{{Quote|Well done, Captain. You lack the stamina of a Kobarian swamp dog…but I'm certain you can match its unquestioning obedience.|Darth Vader compares Imperial Captain Wermis to a Kobarian swamp dog|<ref name="Star Wars 22" />}}
'''Kobarian swamp dogs''', sometimes known simply as '''swamp dogs''', were a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of domestic [[Canine/Legends|canine]] originating from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kobaria system/Legends|Kobaria]]. Two of these creatures, [[Higgs]] and [[Twiggs]], were meant to be [[Marriage/Legends|wedding]] presents for the [[Wroonian/Legends|Wroonian]] [[Pelf Pachoola]] and [[Gender/Legends|her]] [[Pelf Pachoola's fiancé|fiancé]] around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].

==Biology and appearance==
Kobarian swamp [[Dog/Legends|dogs]] were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Canine/Legends|canine]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kobaria system/Legends|Kobaria]],<ref name="Star Wars 22" /> and one of the [[Gender/Legends|genders]] the swamp dogs existed in was male. Members of the species had long heads with [[Color/Legends|green]] fur and purple [[Tongue/Legends|tongues]]. The Kobarian swamp dog also had a tail, and its anatomy possessed ribs and haunches. The stomach-[[Acid/Legends|acid]] of the beasts was particularly noxious.<ref name="Score" />

==Behavior==
Classified as [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]], Kobarian swamp dogs could be domesticated and were known for their unquestioning obedience as well as their stamina.<ref name="Star Wars 22" /> [[Higgs]] and [[Twiggs]], a pair of swamp dogs intended as a [[Marriage/Legends|wedding]] present for the [[Wroonian/Legends|Wroonian]] female [[Pelf Pachoola]], sometimes licked their caretakers and nearby people with their long tongues, and howled while their caretakers were distressed. Higgs and Twiggs also had large appetites and ate treats given to them by their caretakers.<ref name="Score" />

==History==
In existence by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Note">The [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Turk Falso/Legends|Turk Falso's]] [[Death/Legends|death]] date has been confirmed as [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], according to ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''. Since Falso helps [[Hondo Ohnaka/Legends|Hondo Ohnaka]] in the kidnapping in the short story ''[[Hondo Ohnaka's Not-So-Big Score]]'', the event must take place in or before 22 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]].</ref> the Kobarian canines dwelt in a [[Swamp/Legends|swampy]] habitat at some point in their history.<ref name="Star Wars 22" />

==Kobarian swamp dogs in the galaxy==
{{Quote|Daddy loves his Kobarian swamp dogs almost as much as he loves me.|Pelf Pachoola|<ref name="Score" />}}
Kobarian swamp dogs were sometimes used as show dogs, and around 22 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], a pair of swamp dogs named Higgs and Twiggs accompanied Pelf Pachoola on the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] ''[[Salin Mariner]]''. The dogs were a valuable wedding present for Pachoola and her [[Pelf Pachoola's fiancé|fiancé]] from Pachoola's [[Fume Pachoola|father]], who was also on the ''Salin Mariner''. During the liner's voyage, [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Hondo Ohnaka/Legends|Hondo Ohnaka]] succeeded in kidnapping the two Pachoolas as well as the dogs and [[Dix Tarfait|one other guest]] on the [[Starship/Legends|ship]].<ref name="Score" />

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="Another note">The events of [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel ''Star Wars'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] issues 7–35 occur concurrently with the [[Yavin blockade|Blockade of Yavin]], which begins following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] lasts six [[Standard month/Legends|months]], or until 0.5 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', meaning the events of [[Star Wars (1977) 22|''Star Wars'' (1977) 22]] must occur between 0 ABY and 0.5 ABY.</ref> the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] compared [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mulchive Wermis]] to a Kobarian swamp dog after he [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force-choked]] Wermis.<ref name="Star Wars 22" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kobarian swamp dogs were first mentioned in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Star Wars (1977) 22|''Star Wars'' (1977) 22]], written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and published by [[Marvel Comics]] in [[April]] [[1979]].<ref name="Star Wars 22" /> ''[[Hondo Ohnaka's Not-So-Big Score]]'', a short story published in [[Star Wars Insider 144|''Star Wars Insider'' 144]] in [[2013]] and written by [[Jason Fry]], serves as the first appearance of the swamp dogs.<ref name="Score" />
